name: enter_castleSecond
_source: #_current_castle is a string that is used when looking up what castle's unit list to use.
#This tells the game what's for sale in the castle market's armory

#Save the unit's position and then remove them. We do the former in case the player cancels out of a castle, and we do the latter to prevent the player from having a unit simultaneously inside and outside a castle.
#Go to the castle unit select screen
